config.name: Reserve Stress — Calm (shock=0.001)
config.hypothesis: Under calm conditions (shock=0.001), aggressive treasury deployment outperforms hoarding with minimal downside risk

findings: Optimal treasury threshold by fitness: 0.40 (mean fitness: 0.5497) at shock=0.001
Peak population stability at threshold = 0.70 (mean pop: 49.2)
Treasury ratio: 0.0020 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.0046 at hoarding (0.90)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean catastrophe deaths: 1.9 at deployment vs 2.0 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.70 at deployment vs 6.99 at hoarding
